svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(234, 243, 255), rgb(22, 30, 40)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(91, 143, 249), rgb(75, 120, 211));

div.div: Foundation is the base layer. Tools and Runtime depend on Foundation. Governance depends on Foundation and Runtime. BFF depends on Foundation and stays outside the Runtime-Governance chain to avoid circular references.
